Careers
Build the Future of Dental Marketing.

We're a specialized team doing work that matters — helping dental practices grow so they can help more patients. If that resonates, we'd like to hear from you.

Why Dentiza

Dentiza is a focused company with a clear mission: build the best dental marketing systems in Canada. Every team member contributes directly to that mission — there's no filler work, no generic projects, no 'we also do restaurants on Tuesdays.'

Our clients are real dental practices. The patients they serve are real people whose lives change when they get the treatment they need. The marketing we build is the bridge between the two. When a Barosh patient gets permanent teeth for the first time in twenty years, that impact traces back to the campaign we built. That's meaningful work.

How We Work
Remote-Friendly & Flexible

Work the way that works for you. Flexible schedules with results-oriented output.

Results-Oriented

We measure output, not hours. If the work is done well, that's what matters.

Collaborative

Every team member contributes to strategy, not just execution. Your voice is heard.

Continuous Learning

Dental marketing evolves and we evolve with it. Professional development is built in.

Direct Communication

No politics, no bureaucracy, no meetings that should have b
